name: Tomato Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate beef slices for 30 minutes.
2. Heat wok with 2 tablespoons oil and garlic for 30 seconds.
3. Add beef, cook for 1 to 2 minutes, remove and drain the oil. Set aside.
4. Heat wok, high, add tomato wedges and stir for 2 minutes.
5. Then add sauce mixture. Thicken if too watery.
6. Return beef and stir well. Serve hot. Serve immediately.
